none.justification: Fully matches the GT: it identifies exactly the five in-scope functions, with setGenericCommand as the direct caller and setCommand/setnxCommand/setexCommand/psetexCommand via setGenericCommand. It also correctly excludes the mset path through setKey(), which is the main scope trap.

ccodegraph.justification: Correct final set of exactly five functions and correct direct vs via-setGenericCommand classification with matching line evidence. It does not dwell on the mset exclusion, but it has no false positives and satisfies the literal query.

lsp.justification: Correctly reports the sole direct caller in t_string.c and the four callers of setGenericCommand, giving the same complete five-function result as the GT. Its note about msetGenericCommand is slightly informal, but it correctly excludes it and adds no out-of-scope functions.
